text: Because of their significant biological activities, quinazoline derivatives have become a research focus in the field of organic synthesis and bioactivity research. This review discusses the recent progress in the synthesis and bioactivity of quinazoline derivatives. In this review, the literature was classified into five categories based on the method adopted by the authors in the design of the research: Aza-reaction, Microwave-assisted reaction, Metal-mediated reaction, Ultrasound-promoted reaction and Phase-transfer catalysis reaction. The bioactivity of the quinazoline derivatives is also discussed.
